chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1163 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Direction 1.For N.P of CMA 6742/23 13-12-2023 Mr. Asim Aman, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Al Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Rashid Nawaz Rajper, Mukhtiarkar, Ubauro has appeared and submits that he will decide application of the petitioner on merits within 15-days. Accordingly, listed application, in view of above, is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
